productDisplayName: Puma Unisex Ikonis Black Silver Shoe
description: Get used to superior comfort and performance during runs with these Cell Ikonis 2 shoes from puma. These shoes work as hard as you to help you run better and look great at the same time. Team these with jeans and tees for a cool casual look. Upper Mesh uppers with synthetic overlays for high degree of breathability and stability Formstripe and cat logo on the sides for comfort and style Lace-ups for snug Fit OrthoLite sockliner for added comfort, material regeneration, air circulation and anti-microbial function Midsole EVA midsole for added cushioning and improved shock absorption Outsole ArchTec technology to guide the foot through a natural transition from touch-down to toe-off Long-lasting CELL unit in the heel for improved shock absorption EverTrack, a long-lasting composite used in the outsole to provide durability in high-wear areas Aggressive pattern with flex grooves for more flexibility to the feet
